summary: Video. A Fox News 'Breaking News' clip shows border czar Tom Homan speaking at a press conference podium in Minneapolis, flanked by U.S. flags and a DHS backdrop, discussing the manpower cost of arresting criminal aliens in the community versus in jail. It is cable news press conference footage with a news chyron and no music or added editing effects.
notable_text: MINNEAPOLIS LIVE; BREAKING NEWS; NOW: BORDER CZAR TOM HOMAN HOLDS PRESS CONFERENCE; FOX NEWS ALERT
